name: Antique Wastebasket Brass - Threshold™
description: Keep clutter under control while adding a decorative accent to your space with this Antique Wastebasket from Threshold™. This metal wastebasket features a cylindrical silhouette with an open-top design for easy disposal of trash, while the compact size makes it ideal for any room or corner, as well as easy to slide under desks. Showcasing a glossy brass finish, this washroom wastebasket brings rustic-inspired charm to your living space.
